primitives.label: shelf edge -- base line of the lower row
uneven spine tops -- a ragged skyline
three identical spines -- the taxonomic set repeated exactly
the leaning pamphlets -- the grid's one irregularity

notes: A shelf of bindings becomes a taxonomic grid -- dense, legible verticals repeated (a matching trio twice over) against the shelf's own edge, with one leaning cluster of pamphlets the sole break in the rhythm, an ancestor of Blossfeldt's and Ruscha's typological arrays.
